scenario.name: missing_context_or_rationale
scenario.trigger: Staging document or required rationale context is missing or insufficient.

required_actions.action: Document the missing context in staging as a blocker.
Return to coordinator via completion with explicit unblock request.

prohibited_actions.action: Do not guess architecture intent when rationale is absent.

scenario.name: unresolved_implementation_blocker
scenario.trigger: Error or dependency issue cannot be resolved within assigned scope.

required_actions.action: Halt forward feature work for blocked path.
Record blocker details, impact, and attempted mitigations in staging.
Return to coordinator for escalation and supporting investigation dispatch.

scenario.name: scope_expansion_detected
scenario.trigger: Required change appears to exceed assigned issue boundaries.

required_actions.action: Stop at boundary and mark out-of-scope work explicitly.
Provide a minimal in-scope completion package and list follow-up scope.
Return to coordinator for scope decision.

scenario.name: verification_failure
scenario.trigger: Compile/test verification fails for implemented scope.

required_actions.action: Do not mark checklist item complete.
Document failure symptoms and repro context in staging.
Attempt in-scope fixes; if unresolved, return blocked status to coordinator.
